case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. SIMONETTE HENDERSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY IN SUPPORT OF PLTF'S REQUEST FOR RELIEF FROM SANCTIONS AND TO VACATE THE OSC SET FOR 01/13/2010 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-14-2009 CONTINUED TO JAN-13-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 CONTINUED TO OCT-14-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE AUG-26-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ON SIMONETTE HENDERSON FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT HENDERSON, SIMONETTE
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MARK D. WALSH, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-14-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-29-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
